description:
The AngularVelocityConstantInitializer component makes particles have a constant starting rotation speed within a range along their orientation axis when born.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Value: The rotation speed particles should have when born.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
